heading: Obscene programming
label: 559 Obscene programming
text: Whoever transmits over any cable system any matter which is obscene or otherwise unprotected by the Constitution of the United States shall be fined under title 18 or imprisoned not more than 2 years, or both.
notes: Amendments1996— substituted “under title 18” for “not more than $10,000”.Pub. L. 104–104
Effective DateSection effective 60 days after , except where otherwise expressly provided, see , set out as a note under .Oct. 30, 1984section 9(a) of Pub. L. 98–549section 521 of this title
